info.name: Tenantly API
info.description:
Auto-generated from frontend/tools/postman/routes.mjs (see frontend/tools/postman/README.md). Re-run `node frontend/tools/postman/generate-collection.mjs` after editing routes.mjs.

Quick start: import this collection + the matching environment file, pick the persona, run `_Auth › Sign in as <persona>`, then hit any request.

exec: console.warn('No sbCookie — run "_Auth › Sign in" first.');

item.name: _Auth
item.description: Run a Sign in request before any API call. It writes `sbCookie` to the collection variables; the collection pre-request script then attaches it to every request that hits a localhost API route.

exec: // UTF-8 → base64 → base64-URL (the format @supabase/ssr expects: alphabet
// A-Z a-z 0-9 - _, no padding). Standard base64 (+ / =) gets rejected.

request.description: Sign in as landlord@example.com and store the SSR cookie + access token as collection variables.

request.description: Sign in as applicant@example.com and store the SSR cookie + access token as collection variables.
Read the caller's profile
Update the caller's profile
Update the caller's emergency contact (tenant JSONB field)
Soft-warn check: does this email exist?
Request a signed avatar upload URL

Clear the caller’s avatar

Destructive — clears the persisted avatar URL.

Create a new landlord org

Nina is a brand-new landlord with no orgs yet.
List the org's properties
Create a property in the org
List the org's tenancies
Invite a tenant to a room (creates a tenancy in pending_invite)
List org compliance items
Create a compliance item
Seed the standard required compliance set for a property
List rooms in a property
Add a room to a property
Get a single tenancy (tenant viewing their own)
List rent charges for a tenancy
List rent payments for a tenancy

Record a manual rent payment

Smoke uses tiny amount; cleanup deletes the row.

Cancel a pending tenancy invite

422 on rerun: the invite is already cancelled.

End an active tenancy (Renters Rights Bill notice rules apply)

Mutating end of seeded active tenancy disrupts other smokes.
Public invite preview (redacted)

Accept invite — requires auth as the invited email

Requires a user matching the invite email; not idempotent.
Search published listings (anon — redacted address)
Single published listing detail

Submit a room application (tenant only)

Returns 409 if the persona already applied to this room.

Publish a room listing

422 on rerun: listing already closed by the previous close call.

Pause a published listing

422 on rerun: listing already closed.

Close a listing

422 on rerun: listing already closed.
List applications for a room

Reject an application

422 on rerun: application is already rejected. supabase db reset restores.

Accept an application (creates a tenancy in pending_invite)

Multi-step side effect; left for manual Postman drive.
List the org's expenses ledger
Add an expense to the ledger
List quarterly MTD submissions

Record / regenerate a quarterly MTD figure

POST is upsert keyed on (org_id, quarter), so reruns return 201 with the same row.
Export full-year income + expenses as CSV
Export the selected month's rent ledger as CSV
Record / update a tenancy deposit
Log / re-record a Right-to-Rent check
Schedule a new inspection
List active contractors for the org
Add a contractor to the directory

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Smoke Test Contractor",
  "contact_name": "Smoke Person",
  "phone": "+44 7700 900000",
  "email": "smoke@example.com",
  "trades": [
    "general"
  ],
  "coverage_areas": [
    "Birmingham"
  ],
  "day_rate_pence": 20000,
  "rating": 4,
  "notes": "Created by smoke runner — please ignore."
}

request.description: Update business-level org fields (owner only)
List the tenant's applications

Withdraw an application

Mutates the seeded pending application that other smokes rely on.
Get a compliance item
Update a compliance item

Delete a compliance item

Mutates seeded compliance set; left for manual Postman drive.

Start an AST signing run

Hits DocuSeal; requires DOCUSEAL_API_URL + DOCUSEAL_API_TOKEN. 503 expected if not configured.
Get an envelope

Cancel an open envelope

Mutates the only open envelope; left for manual Postman drive.
List documents filtered by parent
Mint a signed Storage upload URL

Record an uploaded document

Storage path uniqueness — script-side flag avoids the collision on rerun.

Mint a signed download URL

Storage object is not actually uploaded in the seed, so signing may 404 — acceptable for smoke.

Delete a document

Mutates seed; left for manual Postman drive.
List the caller's notifications
Mark all notifications read

Mark specific notifications read

Smoke does not assert the body — endpoint accepts unknown ids as a no-op.
Get notification preferences
Update notification preferences
Inbox list

Find or create a direct conversation

Caller must be a member of the org; the other user can be a member or current tenant.
List messages in a conversation
Send a message
List participants
Mark conversation read
Create a maintenance ticket

body.raw:
{
  "property_id": "{{saraPropertyId}}",
  "room_id": "{{saraRoom1Id}}",
  "tenancy_id": "{{jordanTenancyId}}",
  "title": "Smoke ticket",
  "description": "Created by smoke runner — please ignore.",
  "category": "other",
  "severity": "low"
}

request.description: Get a ticket detail

Change a ticket status

422 on rerun: status transitions are validated and a no-op transition is rejected.
Assign a ticket
Add a comment to a ticket
Mint signed attachment upload URL
Mint a signed attachment download URL (404 expected for nonexistent path)
List bills for a property
Create a bill with allocations
Get a bill detail
Update a bill

Delete a bill

Mutates seed; left for manual Postman drive.

Create a Stripe Checkout session

Requires STRIPE_SECRET_KEY + STRIPE_PRICE_PRO_MONTHLY. 4xx/5xx expected if Stripe not configured.

Create a Stripe Customer Portal session

Requires STRIPE_SECRET_KEY + an existing Stripe customer (400 expected on a fresh org).

Start a Direct Debit mandate setup

Hits GoCardless. 5xx expected if GOCARDLESS_ACCESS_TOKEN not set.

Complete a DD mandate after GoCardless redirect

Requires a real GoCardless redirect flow id; otherwise 4xx/5xx.

Cancel a mandate

Mutates seeded mandate; left for manual Postman drive.

Trigger a one-off Direct Debit collection

Tier-gated (rent_collection_dd). 202 expected if no active mandate (Stripe/GC unconfigured).

Initiate a TrueLayer Open Banking payment for a rent charge

503 when TRUELAYER_CLIENT_ID / SECRET unset. 422 when the charge already has a pending payment (smoke runs leave a DD row). 400 / 502 when creds are set but TrueLayer rejects the synthetic beneficiary (sandbox is picky about account-holder names + sort codes — this is fine for smoke).

Poll a TrueLayer payment after the bank redirect

503 acceptable when not configured; demo id will 404 on real call.
Assemble the Rental Passport JSON

Generate a PDF and store it

PDF render + Storage upload. 5xx OK if PDF worker not configured.
Audit log
List orgs
Org detail
Set or clear a manual tier override
Suspend / reinstate an org
Invite a landlord org (sends email via Resend when configured)
List users
User profile detail
Search profiles by email/name
Update platform settings (super only)

Invite a platform admin (sends email via Resend when configured)

409 on rerun: the invitee email is already an admin row.
Update an admin role (super only)

Revoke a platform admin

Mutates the seeded support admin.
Self-assign a platform support ticket

Resolve a platform support ticket

422 on rerun: ticket already resolved.
Notify a landlord of a compliance violation

Retry a failed Stripe invoice (real call when configured)

200 + status=not_configured when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY is absent (dev). 200 + status=no_subscription when the org has no Stripe IDs yet. 422 when Stripe rejects (e.g. no open invoice).
Send a card-update reminder (Resend or console transport)

Start impersonating a landlord (super only)

Mutates the admin auth cookies — drive from a dedicated browser session.
Stop the active impersonation (no-op if none)

Soft-delete a landlord org

Hides the org from the default list view — pair with undelete to re-run.
Reinstate a soft-deleted landlord org

Revoke a pending admin invite

Single-use: 404 once the seeded invite has been revoked.
Send a Resend test email (falls back to console in dev)
Export admin audit log CSV
Export landlords list CSV
Export tenants list CSV
Export billing summary CSV
Export support tickets CSV
Export compliance violations CSV
Export dashboard KPI snapshot CSV

Rate a resolved platform support ticket

Seeded ticket reporter is Oluwaseun (not in personas); test asserts the 422 reporter-mismatch path.
Generate rent charges (dry-run on GET)
Generate rent charges + optionally collect via DD
Compliance reminders cron (dry-run on GET)
Send compliance reminder emails
Write the current month MRR snapshot
Backfill 12 months of MRR snapshots
Replay unprocessed webhook_events (≤25 per run)

Stripe webhook (signed)

Use `stripe trigger` for real events.

GoCardless webhook (signed)

Sign with GOCARDLESS_WEBHOOK_SECRET to test.

TrueLayer webhook (signed)

Sign with TRUELAYER_WEBHOOK_SECRET to test.

DocuSeal webhook (signed)

Sign with DOCUSEAL_WEBHOOK_SECRET to test.
